query:
SELECT cp.id as cpa_project_id, cp.project_id, cpc.id as cpc_id, cpc.consultant_master_id
FROM cpa_projects cp 
JOIN cpa_project_consultants cpc ON cpc.cpa_project_id = cp.id
ORDER BY cp.id DESC, cpc.id;
